detaileddescription.para: Checks if the provided Id is the one that the HHGate was created on. If true, fine, otherwise complains about trying to set the field.
isOriginalChannel returns true if the provided Id is the Id of the channel on which the HHGate was created.
isOriginalChannel returns true if the provided Id is the Id of the Gate created at the same time as the original channel.

memberdef.argsstring: (double v, double c, double *A, double *B) const
memberdef.name: lookupBoth

detaileddescription.para: Single call to get both A and B values in a single lookup
Returns the Id of the original Channel.
